title: Glyptopetalum acutorhombifolium
taxonomy: Glyptopetalum acutorhombifolium belongs to the family Celastraceae. The genus Glyptopetalum is a part of the Celastrales order of flowering plants. This plant species is native to the tropical regions of Asia. Further classification of Glyptopetalum acutorhombifolium includes the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. It is a type of shrub or small tree commonly found in the wild.

The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
